command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute 
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as totale FROM subscribers GROUP BY status;

SELECT email, unsubscribedAt 
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'unsubscribed' AND unsubscribedAt IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY unsubscribedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
